---
title: "Hymnus"
---

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```

![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0001_dwA_01.png){.glyph} *dwꜣ* [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0001_rDj.t-jAw_01.png){.glyph} *rdi.t iꜣw* ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0001_sn-tA-n_01.png){.glyph} *sn tꜣ n* <span style="vertical-align:-75%">&nbsp;</span><br/> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0001_jn_01.png){.glyph} *in* [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0001_Dd=f_01.png){.glyph} *ḏd⸗f* <span style="vertical-align:-75%">&nbsp;</span><br/> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0001_jnD-Hr_01.png){.glyph} *inḏ-ḥr⸗k* / *⸗ṯ* / *⸗ṯn* [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} <b>Lobpreisungen für Gottheit</b>   




## Übersetzung

Verehren/Anbeten [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit} NN, Lobpreis geben den/der [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit} NN, den Boden küssen für [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit} NN von [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.slot-link .slot-person} NN – er sagt: Lobpreis dir/euch, sei gegrüßt/gegrüßst seist du ...

## Überschrift

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*dwꜣ*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/177930' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 177930' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 177930 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>177930</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0001_dwA_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0010_dwA_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0020_dwA_Pyr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Pyr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0030_dwA_seit-MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0040_dwA_seit-MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0050_dwA_seit-MR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0060_dwA_seit-MR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0070_dwA_Ende-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Ende NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0080_dwA_Ende-NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Ende NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0090_dwA_Sp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0100_dwA_Sp_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*rdi.t iꜣw*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/96700' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 96700' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 96700 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>96700</a><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/20360' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 20360' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 20360 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>20360</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0001_rDj.t-jAw_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0010_rDj.t-jAw_02.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0020_rDj.t-jAw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0030_rDj.t-jAw_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0040_rDj.t-jAw_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0050_rDj.t-jAw_NR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0060_rDj.t-jAw_NR_05.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*iꜣw*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/20360' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 20360' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 20360 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>20360</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0001_jAw_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0010_jAw_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0020_jAw_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0030_jAw_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0040_jAw_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0050_jAw_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0060_jAw_Gr_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/02_jAw/0070_jAw_Abk_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Abk.)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*sn tꜣ*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/888530' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 888530' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 888530 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>888530</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0010_sn-tA_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0020_sn-tA_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0030_sn-tA_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0040_sn-tA_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0050_sn-tA_D.18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0060_sn-tA_Abk-MR-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Abk. MR, NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0070_sn-tA_Abk-Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Abk. Gr.)</sup>   



:::



## Beter

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*in*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/26660' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 26660' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 26660 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>26660</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0001_jn_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0010_jn_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0020_jn_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0030_jn_AR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0040_jn_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*ḏd*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/185810' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 185810' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 185810 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>185810</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0010_Dd_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0020_Dd_seitMR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(seit MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0030_Dd_Sp_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Sp.; Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0040_Dd_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0050_Dd_Gr_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>   



:::



## Hauptteil

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*inḏ-ḥr⸗*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/91190' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 91190' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 91190 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>91190</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0001_jnD-Hr_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0010_jnD-Hr_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0020_jnD-Hr_02.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0030_jnD-Hr_AR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0040_jnD-Hr_AR_MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0050_jnD-Hr_AR_MR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0060_jnD-Hr_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0070_jnD-Hr_D18_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(D.18)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0080_jnD-Hr_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0090_jnD-Hr_Gr_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>   



:::





```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  root.style.setProperty('--base-scale', String(scale));

  /*
   * Explicitly resize glyphs and row spacing.
   * Base glyph height: 30px
   * Base row gap: 7.2px
   */
  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-height',
    `${30 * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-row-gap',
    `${7.2 * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', String(scale));

  document.querySelectorAll('.zoom-controls button').forEach(button => {
    button.classList.toggle(
      'active',
      Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
    );
  });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem('site-zoom') || 1
  );

  /*
   * Call the complete function here.
   * Do not restore only --base-scale, because the glyph-specific
   * variables must also be restored.
   */
  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```
